title: Geo Visualizer for the Indian Subcontinent
description: Portfolio-grade historical flat-map visualization for culture, trade, religion, migration, political power, and ideas across the subcontinent, with a time slider, animated routes, filters, clickable nodes, and an explanatory legacy panel.
tweetText: Geo Visualizer for culture movement in subcontinent_p1 pic.twitter.com/IX9NMmKooI

title: Severance-Style User Segmentation Interface
description: High-concept segmentation product that presents user, resident, or customer segments as sterile identity modules and rooms, with strong transitions, comparison views, deliberate reveal, and mocked React + TypeScript data architecture.
tweetText: Severance style data viz for user segmentation pic.twitter.com/HSUDU2DLIQ

title: Financial Balance-Sheet RAG System (FinBizInfo)
description: RAG system that extracts ratios, flags risks, and supports forecasting from noisy PDFs with citation-backed answers and tabular validation.

title: Distributed RAG Microservices (MLOps-Ready)
description: Modular microservice architecture with CI/CD to deploy retrieval and inference components as reusable templates.

title: County-Wide Digital Access Segmentation
description: Resident personas built from ADI/SVI, tech-access proxies, and behavioral segmentation to inform equitable digital service redesign.

title: Diabetes Outcomes & Neighborhood Deprivation Study
description: Spatial modeling and correlation analysis linking diabetes outcomes with neighborhood deprivation indices to guide intervention planning.

title: Trend Forecasting & Influence Optimization
description: NLP + Bayesian optimization + RL to predict campaign virality and recommend actions to improve marketing ROI.

title: Commercial Real Estate Data Pipeline on Azure
description: Automated multi-source property ingestion and dbt modeling; accelerated data acquisition 4× for ML workflows.

title: Customer Service Experience Dashboard
description: Power BI KPI automation and executive reporting for service performance transparency.

title: Sales Analytics Automation (KPMG Collaboration)
description: QlikSense dashboards and SQL automation that improved reporting efficiency by ~35%.

title: Interactive PAC-MAN using MobileNet
description: Gesture-controlled PAC-MAN game using real-time MobileNet inference for interactive gameplay.

title: GeoAI for Environmental Analysis
description: Geospatial AI with spatial statistics to analyze and predict environmental changes.

title: Health Informatics: Diabetes & SDOH
description: Analyzed diabetes prevalence against ADI/SVI neighborhood indices using spatial visualization.

title: Business Optimization via Social Data
description: NLP + RL + Bayesian optimization for virality detection, ad optimization, and trend forecasting.
